compositional_deconstruction.background: warm off-white residential surface with a faint room-plan grid and soft depth of field; leave clean negative space around the edges for article cropping

elements.desc: USB radio sticks and a compact local hub arranged as a practical home automation bench

thin protocol lines connecting devices without logos or labels, a local mini PC hub with soft activity light and abstract AI routing lines, voice waveform shapes as ambient light, no words or UI copy, small presence sensors and room occupancy zones on a simplified floor plan
subtle visual metaphor for Home Assistant Leak Sensors reliability: local paths, status lights, and organized setup, with no readable text

high_level_description: Landscape editorial cover image for a TaraHome technical blog guide: Best Water Leak Sensors for Home Assistant in 2026. Show the specific smart-home topic as real hardware and a local-first system, not a generic stock image. No text, no logos, no brand names, no screenshots, no readable UI.
negative_prompt: words, letters, numbers, captions, logos, watermarks, fake UI text, brand labels, distorted screens, hands, people, messy cables, generic stock photo, purple gradient background

style_description.aesthetics: premium practical smart-home editorial, warm residential technology, local-first, trustworthy, clean product photography mixed with a refined technical diagram
style_description.art_style: high-end technology still life, restrained, detailed, useful, no sci-fi clutter
style_description.lighting: soft natural window light with subtle Tara green status glows, realistic shadows, high clarity
